tasks.label: Run Django tests for domain rules
Run Django tests after test reorganization
Run Django tests for CRUD expansion
Run Django tests after aluno rename
Check Docker Desktop process
args: Get-Process -Name 'Docker Desktop' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id, MainWindowTitle | Out-String

tasks.label: Start Docker Desktop
args: if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe') { Start-Process 'C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe'; Write-Output 'DOCKER_DESKTOP_STARTED' } else { Write-Output 'DOCKER_DESKTOP_NOT_FOUND'; exit 1 }

tasks.label: Start Docker Desktop direct
tasks.command: if (Test-Path "C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe") { Start-Process "C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe"; Write-Output "DOCKER_DESKTOP_STARTED" } else { Write-Output "DOCKER_DESKTOP_NOT_FOUND"; exit 1 }

tasks.label: Start Docker Desktop direct quoted
tasks.command: if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe') { Start-Process 'C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe'; Write-Output 'DOCKER_DESKTOP_STARTED' } else { Write-Output 'DOCKER_DESKTOP_NOT_FOUND'; exit 1 }

tasks.label: Wait for Docker daemon
tasks.command: $deadline = (Get-Date).AddMinutes(3); while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) { docker info *> $null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Output 'DOCKER_READY'; exit 0 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 }; Write-Output 'DOCKER_TIMEOUT'; exit 1

tasks.label: Validate coverage target
args: coverage run --source='app,gradesync' manage.py test && coverage report -m

tasks.label: Validate coverage target fixed
args: coverage run --source=app,gradesync manage.py test && coverage report -m

tasks.label: Check make install location
args: winget list --id GnuWin32.Make; $candidates = @('C:\Program Files (x86)\GnuWin32\bin\make.exe','C:\Program Files\GnuWin32\bin\make.exe','C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\make.exe'); foreach ($p in $candidates) { if (Test-Path $p) { Write-Output ('FOUND: ' + $p) } }

tasks.label: Detect make path explicit
tasks.command: $paths = @('C:\Program Files (x86)\GnuWin32\bin\make.exe','C:\Program Files\GnuWin32\bin\make.exe','C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\make.exe'); $found = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ }; if ($found) { $found | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ } } else { Write-Output 'MAKE_NOT_FOUND' }

tasks.label: Find installed make path
tasks.command: $paths = @('C:\Program Files (x86)\GnuWin32\bin\make.exe','C:\Program Files\GnuWin32\bin\make.exe','C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\make.exe'); $found = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ }; if ($found) { $found | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ } } else { Write-Output 'MAKE_NOT_FOUND' }
